name: house-noble-townhouse
summary: The receiving parlor of a noble townhouse — where the family meets callers. Tasteful, expensive, deliberately curated.

primary_palette.note: conversation parlor — the fire is the social axis
musical family — recitals for guests, the piano is the centerpiece
afternoon-visit parlor — cards and tea, four-seat arrangement
collector's parlor — the room exists to show off curiosities

story_prompts: awaiting an important caller — fire built up, decanter laid out, nobody yet present
the morning after a social triumph — cards scattered, ashtrays full, servants not yet cleaning
the family is in mourning — mirrors draped, furniture pushed to the walls
the parlor hides a secret — a panel behind the painting, a coded book on the shelf
the lord and lady are having the Argument again — chairs pulled apart, the settee empty

lighting_notes.ambient_intent: formal warm (0.5-0.6) — fireplace and candelabra, window light by day

anti_patterns: no clutter — servants keep this room presentation-ready at all times
no trade tools or working surfaces — this is a performance room
the fireplace belongs on a wall, not freestanding — anchor it
symmetry matters — pair your armchairs, balance your art
